caption: A person is crafting a card on a white surface with a grid cutting mat. They are wearing a white watch and are seen from the chest down. In the initial sequence, the person positions a thin strip of white paper with dark leaf patterns next to a blue card featuring a purple forest illustration. A metal ruler is placed horizontally across the bottom of the card for alignment. As the sequence progresses, the person's hands carefully slide the patterned strip over the blue card, overlapping the edge of the purple forest image. To the right, there is a black ink pad and a larger piece of floral patterned paper. Small white pieces of adhesive tape are scattered on the mat. The watermark "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom left of each scene. The focus remains on the precise placement of the decorative strip onto the card base.
